sys_script_client.description:
Confirms and prompts the user to provide a reason to cancel the task, triggered by cancel ui-action
v2.7 2.7.0 | 2021-09-22 | mmcc | STRY0108861 - DIA- Cancel from Top Task Notification Updated to be able to show a widget for the Portal and an UI Page for Platform
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit prompt cancel reason
